text: Last summer, I finally planned a trip to Japan, something I had dreamed about for years. I spent weeks researching flights, hotels, and must-see places like Tokyo’s busy streets and Kyoto’s peaceful temples. Experiencing a new culture was amazing—I tried local customs, like taking off my shoes before entering homes. The food was a highlight: I loved fresh sushi and warm ramen from tiny street stalls. However, language barriers made ordering tricky; I often used hand gestures and a translation app. Despite the challenges, those moments created unforgettable memories that I still smile about today.
